implemented: Fixed Report Problem flow with stable overlay instead of broken flashcard flip.
Report page has Betreff, Zusammenfassung, Absenden, and Zurück.
Flashcard and controls are hidden/disabled while reporting mode is active.
Submit shows German thank-you message and replaces form actions with Zurück.
Zurück restores the learning view and resumes playback when it was active before reporting.
Frontend posts to /api/report-problem; recipient email is only in server-side endpoint file.
Voice mapping UI and watermark section remain removed.
important_limitations: GitHub Pages alone cannot send email because it cannot run server-side endpoints. Deploy api/report-problem.js on Vercel/Node or adapt it to your backend.
Browser/PWA background TTS remains best-effort. Guaranteed locked-screen playback requires native background audio or bundled/backend audio.
